title: Self-join for siblings
prompt: Write `MyApp.Accounts.users_with_same_team/0` that returns pairs of users who share a team, excluding self-pairs and duplicates (each pair appears once). Self-join on User via the team_id column, filter `u1.id < u2.id` to dedupe pairs. Select `{u1.name, u2.name, u1.team_id}`. Write to `lib/my_app/accounts.ex`.
tier_rationale: Self-joins require explicit variable naming (u1, u2). Pair deduplication via `<` is a subtle SQL pattern.
